briefdescription.para: Write a value to a TMRManager register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the TMRManager device.
is the register offset from the base to write to.
is the data written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTMR_Manager_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Read a value from a TMRManager register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the TMRManager device.
is the register offset from the base to read from.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XTMR_Manager_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: Set the contents of the control register.

detaileddescription.para: Use the XTM_CR_* constants defined above to create the bit-mask to be written to the register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the 32-bit value to write to the control register

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: void XTMR_Manager_SetControlReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Mask);

briefdescription.para: Get the contents of the first failing register.

detaileddescription.para: Use the XTM_FFR_* constants defined above to interpret the bit-mask returned.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the status register.

briefdescription.para: Clear the contents of the first failing register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the status register.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if a lockstep mismatch has occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: TRUE if a lockstep mismatch has occurred, FALSE otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: We cannot read the SEM Interrupt Mask Register, so we just write the enabled interrupt bits and clear all others. Since the register only defines the interrupt mask, this works without side effects.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

detaileddescription.para: We cannot read the SEM Interrupt Mask Register, so we just clear all bits. Since the register only defines the interrupt mask, this works without side effects.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
